law: Every walked package has a terminal state; every suite failure reconciles to a working-failure entry with evidence. STALE when entry.commit predates the last src/ change (see test/ecosystem/lib/ledger.cjs).

stateKey.PASS: Ported AND behaviorally verified: observed runtime behavior matches Elm.
stateKey.PASS-compile-only: Ported; gren compiles and `gren docs` verifies. Runtime behavior not asserted.
stateKey.EXEMPT-kernel: Out of scope: depends on Elm Kernel / effect-module native code.
stateKey.EXEMPT-glsl: Out of scope: uses WebGL/GLSL shaders the target does not support.
stateKey.EXEMPT-broken-upstream: Out of scope: the upstream Elm package is itself broken / unbuildable.
stateKey.working-failure: Reproduced, evidenced failure to port on the stamped commit (reason + evidence required).

seededFrom: documented seed (pure 201/202, browser 246/252) at commit 0d0ce41 — no LAST_RUN.json proof present
snapshotCrossCheck: all 454 suite packages present in registry snapshot (2055)
